text: Traditional algorithms are not applicable to small targets in remote sensing images due to the presence of background noise and lack of effective information. An improved algorithm, called LAR-YOLOv8, based on YOLOv8 is proposed. The network is divided into three parts: 1) The local branch in the feature extraction network is improved using the architecture attention mechanism of the dual-branch and vision transformer block to achieve the maximum extraction of feature map. 2) An attention-guided bidirectional feature pyramid network is proposed to extract the features of the shallow network effectively by using the dynamic sparse attention mechanism and add top-down paths to guide other network modules for feature fusion. 3) The RIOU loss function is proposed to avoid loss failure and improve the shape consistency between the prediction and ground truth of the box. The experimental results of LAR-YOLOv8 on three datasets of NWPU VHR-10, RSOD and CARPK are compared with mAP (small), mAP, number of model parameters and FPS, and the improvement of the original YOLOv8 model is verified.
